content.text: For editor advice, remember: JetBrains tools are my default choice, but suggest VS Code only when there is a strong plugin reason.

structured.fullText: Got it. I’ll default to JetBrains for editor advice, and only suggest VS Code when there’s a strong plugin-based reason.
